title: Recurring Solder Voiding near Solder Joint J4 and BGA Regions
likely_driver: Process inconsistency in soldering causing void clusters near critical joints (J4 and BGA areas) across multiple product lines and stations.
recommended_action: Investigate soldering process parameters and equipment calibration at XRay stations (XRay-02, XRay-03, XRay-01). Implement tighter process controls and increase inspection frequency for early detection.

title: Pin Misalignment on Battery Connector Housing Left Edge
likely_driver: Assembly or fixture misalignment causing slight pin shifts on the left edge of connectors.
recommended_action: Review and adjust assembly fixtures and operator training for pin placement. Consider additional manual inspection or automated alignment verification.

title: Recurring Surface Scratches on Sensor Mount Bracket and Shielded Micro Board
likely_driver: Handling or rework processes causing surface scratches on bracket arms and board edges.
recommended_action: Evaluate handling procedures and rework processes to minimize surface damage. Implement protective measures and operator awareness training.
